data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Organizer override for manual approvals', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or tested. While the linked use case mentions that the system warns the organizer and releases unpaid seats unless overridden, there is no direct evidence showing that the override functionality is operational or how it can be invoked. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence demonstrating the implementation or testing of the organizer override functionality for manual approvals.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for organizer override functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the organizer override for manual approvals.
